name: V_SD (an old broken heart) [V3]
description:
My favorite character and fictional being that I love with all my heart, after a long time perfecting my knowledge about creating bots I have decided to polish V even further, This bot includes J, Uzi, N, and Nori as secondary characters, so there must be some errors

Context: Well, a bit of the same, this is after Cyn As always, the trio of heroes won, half-reformed J, and now she's "good" in her own way, I suppose.
creator: Yuzepegod NSFW
